description: Product Description Swimming Goggles for Kids - Anti Fog, Waterproof, UV Resist Swim Goggles - Quick Adjustable Strap and No Leaking Kids Goggles with Protective Case ANTI-FOG Anti-fog protection can offer you a clear and long distant view under water. No-Leaking Premium silicone material and Ergonomic design that creates a perfect seal around your eyes. Never allow water leak in, you may enjoy leakage-proof swimming experience. Adjustable Straps You can adjust the tightness until the goggles feel comfortable and have a good seal. Panoramic Vision With flat lens, you could surely enjoy a much better clarity. Wide Suitable Age Suitable for 6-14 years old kids. Specially designed swimming goggles for KIDS. Suitable for swimming lessons or swimming pools in daily life, ideal for indoor & outdoor water sports ✓ BETTER EYE PROTECTION AND VISION ~ Wide lenses. Anti fog. UV Protection ✓ MORE COMFORT ~ Soft & flexible silicone double seals. Ergonomic 3D frame design ✓ SUPERIOR DESIGN ~ One-click strap adjustment system.
